name: Adam's Favorite Dessert - Kolacky
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and confectioners' sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the almond extract and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the sifted flour to the mixture. Mix until a stiff dough forms.
4. Roll tablespoon-sized portions of the dough into balls.
5. Place the dough balls on a greased baking tin, making sure they are well-spaced.
6. Use your thumb to make an indentation in each dough ball.
7. Fill each indentation with a can of Solo fruit filling.
8. Bake for 15 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Once done, sift additional powdered sugar over the kolaches.
